overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a dark forest at night. The character traverses grassy meadows, rocky passages, and forest trails under a starry sky with distant mountains visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest meadow with scattered pine trees

events.description: a deer runs across the path from right to left in the mid-distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the grassy meadow with a sword on his back, surveying the surroundings

notable_agents.action: deer running across the path from right to left, disappearing into the trees

entered.detail: dense cluster of tall pine trees forming the forest edge
open grassy field with scattered wildflowers and tall grass
dark night sky filled with visible stars and faint clouds
snow-capped or rocky mountains visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide forest meadow at night, with the character walking through tall grass under a starry sky. Tall pine trees line the left side while distant mountains are visible ahead. A deer briefly runs across the path from right to left, adding life to the otherwise empty natural landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon passage between cliff formations

events.description: entering a narrow passage between large rock formations on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow rocky passage, flanked by tall cliff walls on both sides

entered.detail: large dark rock wall and boulders forming a narrow canyon
worn dirt trail winding through the rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow rocky canyon, with large cliff formations rising on both sides. The path becomes a dirt trail winding through the rocks, and the sky is partially obscured by the rock walls. The vegetation thins out as the scene transitions from open meadow to enclosed rocky passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open valley with distant settlement lights visible

events.description: exiting the rocky canyon into a wide valley with distant lights visible

agents.ego_description: walking through an open valley, heading toward distant lights on the horizon

entered.detail: wide open valley floor with green grass and scattered rocks
faint warm lights suggesting a village or camp in the distance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the rocky canyon, the scene opens into a wide grassy valley. The character walks toward distant settlement lights visible on the right horizon, with mountains looming in the background. The terrain is open and exposed, transitioning from the enclosed rocks to a more expansive landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with thick tree cover

events.description: character turns slightly left to follow the winding forest path

agents.ego_description: walking along a winding dirt path through dense forest, navigating around trees and rocks

entered.detail: thick cluster of pine trees close to the path creating dense cover
thick cluster of pine trees close to the path creating dense cover

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character entering a denser forest area with thick pine trees closing in on both sides of the winding dirt path. The distant settlement lights fade from view as the forest canopy thickens, creating a more enclosed and intimate woodland atmosphere. The path curves gently as the character continues exploring deeper into the woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a nocturnal wilderness that shifts from open meadows into restrictive rocky passages and back into expansive valleys before ending in a dense forest. It begins in a wide meadow under a starry sky, where the camera follows the character through tall grass past towering pines as a deer darts across the path. As the terrain narrows, the scene transitions into a rocky canyon with high cliff formations that obscure the sky and thin out the surrounding vegetation. The environment then opens up again into a wide grassy valley, revealing distant settlement lights on the horizon against a backdrop of looming mountains. Finally, the path curves away from the lights and leads the character into a thick pine forest, where the canopy closes in to create an intimate, enclosed woodland atmosphere.
